title: Senior Software Engineer - PharmEasy Ventures Solutions - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - PharmEasy Ventures Solutions - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
Join the PharmEasy Ventures Solutions family as a Senior Software Engineer in Ranchi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About PharmEasy Ventures Solutions:
PharmEasy Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PharmEasy Ventures Solutions!
